inputs.prompt: Square mobile app icon for 'FAMtastic', a joyful yet premium personal AI assistant. Centerpiece: a single bold glossy 3D letter F monogram in a luminous FAMtastic brand gradient — royal blue into golden yellow into vivid red — with a lush vibrant green palm-frond grass burst spraying upward behind it. Rounded-square iOS/Android app icon, centered with generous padding, glossy reflective finish, soft depth and shadow, premium app-store quality, instantly recognizable at small sizes, crisp, modern, NO text, NO wordmark, NO letters other than the F. Dramatic near-black charcoal background hex 0f0f0e for a dark app UI; the glossy F and green palm burst glow vividly against the dark; cinematic premium.
